title: polygala equisetoides
intro: Polygala equisetoides, also known as Horse Lyre or Horse Lyre Vine, is a flowering plant species within the Polygalaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Its health benefits include treating bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and its dried roots and leaves are often used in traditional herbal remedies.
